description_en: Dubai, in the UAE, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 5/5. Muslim travelers will find 150 halal restaurants listed, 950 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind. Best time to visit: November–March.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Dubai: 150 halal restaurants listed, 950 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 5/5.
sectionMangerHalal: À Dubaï, la loi impose le halal dans la restauration : mangez partout l'esprit tranquille, du boui-boui pakistanais de Deira (repas généreux dès 8 €) au fine dining de Downtown. Les food courts des malls alignent toutes les cuisines du monde, halal sans exception.
sectionMangerHalal_en: In Dubai, halal food service is required by law: eat anywhere with peace of mind, from Deira's Pakistani canteens (hearty meals from €8) to Downtown fine dining. Mall food courts line up every cuisine on earth, halal without exception.
sectionOuPrier: Mosquées à chaque quartier, salles de prière dans tous les malls, stations de métro et attractions. La mosquée de Jumeirah se visite ; pour prier, vous ne chercherez jamais plus de deux minutes.
sectionOuPrier_en: Mosques in every district, prayer rooms in all malls, metro stations and attractions. Jumeirah Mosque welcomes visitors; for prayer, you'll never search more than two minutes.
